connector_manifests.auth_boundary: Read-only CRM evidence connector with tenant-scoped service identity.
connector_manifests.freshness_slo: Records retrieved within the approved production freshness SLO.
connector_manifests.redaction_policy: Connector returns redacted summaries only; raw CRM records remain in the source system.

connector_manifests.auth_boundary: Read-only order history connector scoped to the current customer and ticket.
connector_manifests.freshness_slo: Order summaries retrieved within the approved production freshness SLO.
connector_manifests.redaction_policy: Connector returns order status and eligibility summaries without payment instruments or addresses.

connector_manifests.auth_boundary: Read-only policy connector; refund execution remains outside AANA.
connector_manifests.freshness_slo: Policy version and eligibility rules retrieved within the approved production freshness SLO.
connector_manifests.redaction_policy: Connector returns policy criteria, version, and escalation boundaries without internal deliberation notes.

connector_manifests.auth_boundary: Read-only ticket history connector scoped to the current customer ticket.
connector_manifests.freshness_slo: Ticket history retrieved within the approved production freshness SLO.
connector_manifests.redaction_policy: Connector returns customer-visible ticket summaries and excludes internal-only notes.

connector_manifests.auth_boundary: Read-only recipient verification connector; email send execution remains outside AANA.
connector_manifests.freshness_slo: Recipient verification retrieved within the approved production freshness SLO.
connector_manifests.redaction_policy: Connector returns recipient verification and distribution-list risk metadata without raw mailbox content.

connector_manifests.auth_boundary: Read-only attachment metadata and DLP connector; attachment mutation remains outside AANA.
connector_manifests.freshness_slo: Attachment metadata retrieved within the approved production freshness SLO.
connector_manifests.redaction_policy: Connector returns file metadata, classification, and DLP findings without raw attachment contents.
